languages.text: If a creature without {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Reset Resistance{/g} moves in the nearest cell, it will be sent back in time where it started their turn restoring all Wounds that has been lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: If a creature without {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Reset Resistance{/g} moves in the nearest cell, it will be sent back in time where it started their turn restoring all Wounds that has been lost during the turn.

languages.text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.
languages.original_text: If a creature without {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Reset Resistance{/g} moves in the nearest cell, it will be sent back in time where it started their turn restoring all Wounds that has been lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: If a creature that is not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to the adjacent cell, it will be sent back to where it started its turn, restoring all wounds that were lost during the turn.

If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

languages.text: Если существо, на которое не действует эффект {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}временной якорь{/g}, перемещается на клетку рядом с хрономантом, оно будет возвращено туда, где начало свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, и восстановит все {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}, потерянное за ход.
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: Если существо, на которое не действует эффект {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}временной якорь{/g}, перемещается на клетку рядом с хрономантом, оно будет возвращено туда, где начало свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, и восстановит все {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}, потерянное за ход.

Если существо, на которое не действует эффект {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}временной якорь{/g}, перемещается на клетку рядом с хрономантом, оно будет возвращено туда, где начало свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, и восстановит все {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровье{/g}, потерянное за ход.

languages.text: Bewegt sich eine Kreatur, die nicht mit {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Temporalanker{/g} belegt ist, auf ein Feld neben dem Chronomant, kehrt sie auf ihr Ausgangsfeld zu Beginn des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} zurück und regeneriert alle während des Zuges verlorenen {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}.
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: Bewegt sich eine Kreatur, die nicht mit {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Temporalanker{/g} belegt ist, auf ein Feld neben dem Chronomant, kehrt sie auf ihr Ausgangsfeld zu Beginn des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} zurück und regeneriert alle während des Zuges verlorenen {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}.

languages.text: Si una criatura no afectada por el efecto {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}anclaje temporal{/g} se mueve a una casilla adyacente al Cronomante, volverá adonde empezó su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} y recuperará las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} que perdiera durante el turno.
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: Si una criatura no afectada por el efecto {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}anclaje temporal{/g} se mueve a una casilla adyacente al Cronomante, volverá adonde empezó su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} y recuperará las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} que perdiera durante el turno.

languages.text: {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Zaman çapası{/g} etkisinden etkilenmeyen bir yaratık, Kronobaz'ın bitişiğindeki bir hücreye hareket ettiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turuna{/g} ilk başladığı yere geri gönderilir ve o turda kaybettiği tüm {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanlarını tazeler.
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Zaman çapası{/g} etkisinden etkilenmeyen bir yaratık, Kronobaz'ın bitişiğindeki bir hücreye hareket ettiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turuna{/g} ilk başladığı yere geri gönderilir ve o turda kaybettiği tüm {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanlarını tazeler.

languages.text: 当一个不受{g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}时间锚点{/g}效果影响的生物移动到编时匠的相邻格子时，该生物将被送回到其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时的位置，并恢复在该回合损失的所有{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: 当一个不受{g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}时间锚点{/g}效果影响的生物移动到编时匠的相邻格子时，该生物将被送回到其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时的位置，并恢复在该回合损失的所有{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}。

languages.text: Si une créature qui n'est pas affectée par l'effet d'{g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Ancrage temporel{/g} se rend sur une case adjacente au chronomancien, elle est renvoyée à l'endroit où elle a commencé son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} et regagne les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} perdues pendant le tour.
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: Si une créature qui n'est pas affectée par l'effet d'{g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}Ancrage temporel{/g} se rend sur une case adjacente au chronomancien, elle est renvoyée à l'endroit où elle a commencé son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} et regagne les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} perdues pendant le tour.

languages.text: {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}時間錨{/g}効果の影響を受けない生き物がクロノマンサーの隣接するマスに移動すると、その生き物は{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時にいた場所に戻り、そのターン中に失われたすべての{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が回復する。
languages.original_text: If a creature not affected by the {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}temporal anchor{/g} effect moves to a cell adjacent to the Chronomancer, it will be sent back to where it started its {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, restoring all {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} that were lost during the turn.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:12acfc39b6914a059e3eb2eb5a0c6ae8}時間錨{/g}効果の影響を受けない生き物がクロノマンサーの隣接するマスに移動すると、その生き物は{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時にいた場所に戻り、そのターン中に失われたすべての{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が回復する。
